coverage.scope: official dataset identity, dimensions, file size, DOI, license, feature groups, and limitations
limitations: The official page does not publish a cryptographic file checksum; the first approved download must be hashed before use.

notes: The digest binds a normalized metadata tuple, not dataset bytes. UCI reports DOI 10.24432/C50K5N, CC BY 4.0, 581012 rows, 54 features, and a 10.7 MB data file.

source: public arXiv and PMLR search pages

coverage.scope: Covertype wilderness-area split sensitivity and feature-ablation overlap
limitations: SciSpace transport failed for all three attempted queries.
The fallback search was limited to public arXiv and PMLR pages.
No exact-match result does not establish novelty; global overlap remains unknown.

notes: The retrieved Wilderness Area paper confirms prior reuse of Covertype's area structure but does not establish the proposed supervised split-sensitivity protocol as novel.

source: public arXiv and PMLR search pages

coverage.scope: Covertype class imbalance and general label-smoothing calibration overlap
limitations: The search was not systematic or exhaustive.
Retrieved work already studies class-weighted risk on Covertype and label smoothing in other domains.
No research novelty claim is permitted.

notes: Class weighting is overlapping prior work; label smoothing is a mature calibration method and would be only a bounded replication here.

coverage.scope: Downloaded archive identity and safe archive structure
limitations: UCI did not publish a cryptographic checksum on the dataset page, so this is a locally measured first-download hash.
The hash identifies the bytes retrieved on this date and must be rechecked before every use.

notes: The 11251206-byte archive contained only covtype.data.gz, covtype.info, and old_covtype.info; it had zero traversal and zero encrypted entries.

coverage.scope: Row shape, numeric type, one-hot integrity, global label counts, and label coverage by wilderness area
limitations: This is a schema and coverage audit, not a scientific validation of labels.
Area 4 is unsuitable for the primary closed-set holdout comparison because class 4 appears only in area 4 and would be absent from training.

notes: All 581012 rows had 55 integer columns, valid one-hot wilderness and soil fields, and no malformed rows. Areas 1-3 retain every test class in their complementary training set; area 4 does not.
